title: workspace_book_inventory.json
description: Phase B Preflight output. Produced before the SPy iteration loop begins. Lists every book required by the captured V1 source (KLang stages + Python stages, per stage), whether the target workspace has an active CONNECTION for that book, and whether the connected procedure matches the intent. Lines that do not require a book (control flow, arithmetic, string ops) are omitted. NOTE: 'connected' means a workspace connection exists in READY state, not merely that the book is in the platform catalog.

stages.description: Keyed by stage_number (string). One entry per stage in <STAGES> (orchestrator + each sub-automation).

overall_status.description: all_connected: every requirement has resolution 'connected' AND no pending_confirmations. needs_action: at least one requirement is 'available_not_connected' (book exists on platform, no workspace connection) OR there is a pending_confirmation (e.g. choice between two connected candidate books). blocked: at least one requirement is 'not_in_platform' (book doesn't exist on the platform catalog at all).

blockers.description: Populated when overall_status == 'blocked'. Each entry corresponds to a book_requirement whose resolution is 'not_in_platform' (i.e., not even available to be connected). The SE's choice is between an Astral-build for the missing book, scope-cutting the requirement, or revisiting intent classification.

connections_needed.description: Populated when overall_status == 'needs_action' and the reason is at least one requirement with resolution 'available_not_connected'. Lists the platform-available books that the SE must connect in the workspace (or authorize Quill to request mid-Phase-B) before iteration can proceed cleanly.

candidate_books.description: Books available on the platform that satisfy this intent. SE picks one to connect; or accepts a Quill request_connection deferral.

pending_confirmations.description: Populated when overall_status == 'needs_action'. Batched questions for the SE; the agent waits for one combined response before continuing. Typical questions: 'Two connected candidates satisfy this intent — which one?', 'V1 Python uses HTTP wrapper but procedure name suggests native book — preserve or re-architect?', 'V1 KLang uses dept-box (cross-run state) — keep as native S3 or in-SPy dict?'.

question.description: Verbatim text shown to the SE.

confirmation_type.description: Hint to downstream tooling about what kind of decision is being asked.

intent_description.description: Short description of what the KLang line needs (e.g. 'extract structured fields from PDF', 'discover customer from NetSuite').

intent_category.description: Classification from books.md. 'other' for anomalies the agent could not categorize confidently.

evidence_lines.description: Line numbers in this stage's klang/stage<N>_<slug>.txt that motivate this requirement.

candidate_books.description: Candidate book names from books.md. Length 1 for explicit cases (e.g. 'from netsuite'); >1 when ambiguous (e.g. Excel vs Microsoft Excel) or when the choice between LLM book vs inline SPy applies.

matched_procedures.description: Procedures returned by kognitos_books(search_procedures, query=<intent_description>) — workspace-scoped first (Step 2 of the preflight procedure), then global fallback (Step 3). Filtered to results whose book_name is in candidate_books. Includes both in_workspace=true (connected) and in_workspace=false (available_not_connected) entries.

book_name.description: Book identifier as returned by the MCP, e.g. 'gmail', 'outlook', 'csv'.

procedure_signature.description: Human-readable procedure signature, e.g. 'to send an email'.

rank.description: Semantic-search score from search_procedures. NOTE: scores can be low (≤0.05) even on correct matches — do not threshold on this field.

connection_id.description: Active connection identifier in the target workspace (e.g. 'csv-b8qhl'). Present iff in_workspace == true. Quill can target this via search_workspace_book_connection_procedures.

in_workspace.description: true if this procedure was returned by workspace-scoped search (active connection exists). false if returned only by global search (platform-available but not connected).

chosen_book.description: Selected book for this requirement. Populated when resolution == 'connected' and there's only one candidate, OR after the SE answers a 'choose_between_connected_candidates' pending_confirmation.

chosen_connection_id.description: Active connection_id for the chosen_book. Populated alongside chosen_book.

resolution.description: connected: workspace-scoped search_procedures returned a procedure from a candidate_books entry (active connection exists, in_workspace==true on at least one matched_procedure). available_not_connected: no candidate book has an active workspace connection, but global search_procedures returns at least one candidate book — SE must connect it (or authorize Quill request_connection). not_in_platform: global search_procedures returns nothing matching any candidate book — the platform doesn't expose this capability.
